message:
Running command: # Only 4 FDs and no memory-mapped ODB files yet.
# This means OpenROAD/antenna_check.tcl is still in the TCL loading/env setup phase.
# The rchar=220MB was from loading all the library files (.lib).
# 
# This is actually taking a LONG time for lib loading. Let's check how much CPU time:
cat /proc/625425/stat 2>/dev/null | awk '{print "utime:", $14/100, "stime:", $15/100}'

# Also check what memory it's currently using
cat /proc/625425/status 2>/dev/null | grep "VmRSS\|VmPeak\|RssAnon"
